final:
module up_down_counter_3bit(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    input wire dir,
    output reg [2:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 3'b000;
        end else if (en) begin
            if (dir) begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end else begin
                count <= count - 1;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
